# athoce

> athoce seoul is a shop in mangwon-dong, seoul with an online catalog for objects, fashion, and rental products.

## primary urls

- https://athoce.kr/
- https://athoce.kr/sitemap.xml
- https://hooman.kr/

## site context

athoce.kr is the online shop and catalog interface for athoce seoul.
The site is intended for product browsing, product detail review, and rental availability inquiry.
Its product data is synchronized through hooman.kr and the Imweb API.
Orders, payments, shipping, returns, and legal terms follow hooman.kr.

## important notes

- athoce seoul is the primary brand and shop identity
- the mirror storefront architecture is a technical implementation detail
- athoce.kr is not an independent checkout provider
- public product pages use `/detail.html?prodNo=...`
- rental products may require password access
- admin and OAuth endpoints are not public content

## preferred summary

athoce seoul is a mangwon-dong, seoul shop with an online catalog for selected objects, fashion items, and rental products.
